message:
feat: add polymorphic ArrayStorage, sort kind parameter, advanced gradient, higher-degree roots, and N-D trapezoid

Introduce ArrayStorage enum in fnp-dtype for typed multi-dtype storage
(Bool/I8-I64/U8-U64/F32/F64/Complex64/Complex128/String) replacing
Vec<f64>-only patterns, with full get/set/cast/zeros methods and
StorageError type.

Add sort algorithm selection (quicksort/mergesort/stable/heapsort) to
sort() and argsort() via optional kind parameter matching NumPy's
np.sort(kind=...). Enhance gradient_advanced() with edge_order=2
second-order one-sided finite differences and non-uniform spacing
support. Extend polynomial roots() to degree>=3 via companion matrix
eigenvalue method with proper leading/trailing zero handling.
Generalize trapezoid() integration to N-D arrays with axis parameter.
Add vectorize_binary and vectorize_n broadcasting helpers. Update all
conformance differential call sites for new sort/argsort signatures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
